narrative:
66 Ohio House district has 85,345 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.1% D−R vs -21.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
